zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱，需关注支撑压力
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格维持在2357.94附近，24小时几乎无明显波动，显示市场短期交投谨慎。价格略低于20日均线2369.05，短线趋势偏弱，但并未出现快速下跌，表明多空力量暂时均衡，市场仍处于整理阶段。  

MACD指标显示为-10.22598，未形成明显多头信号，暗示空方仍占一定优势，但缺少信号线数据限制了判断的精确性。若价格持续低于SMA20，可能引发进一步回调压力，同时观察成交量变化有助于捕捉突破方向。  

近期支撑位关注2356-2355区域，若失守则可能测试更低支撑2330附近；阻力位在2369-2375区间，突破该区域可打开反弹空间。整体来看，短期波动幅度有限，适合以区间策略为主。  

交易建议上，谨慎者可等待价格回踩支撑后做短线多单，止损设置在2354下方；偏激进者可在突破SMA20及阻力位后布局顺势多单，控制仓位以防突发回撤。同时保持关注宏观市场情绪和大盘比特币走势对ETH的联动影响。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading just below its 20-period moving average, suggesting a mild short-term bearish bias. The extremely tight daily range and minimal 24-hour change reflect a market in consolidation, with low volatility and indecision among participants. Price action hovering near recent lows indicates that buyers are hesitant, while sellers lack strong momentum to push significantly lower, creating a temporary equilibrium zone.

The SMA(20) sitting above the current price reinforces short-term resistance around the 2369 level. Meanwhile, the MACD reading in negative territory points to underlying bearish momentum, even though signal line confirmation is missing. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold insights, but given the compressed range, momentum indicators would likely show neutral conditions, aligning with the current sideways structure.

Immediate support can be identified near 2356, which aligns closely with the recent intraday low. A breakdown below this level could expose further downside toward the 2340–2325 zone. On the upside, resistance remains firm near 2369, followed by a stronger barrier around 2400, where prior selling pressure may re-emerge. A decisive move beyond either boundary will likely determine the next directional phase.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies may be more effective in the short term, such as buying near support and selling near resistance with tight risk controls. Momentum traders may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above 2369 or a breakdown below 2356 before entering positions. Given the weak directional signals, patience and disciplined risk management are essential in this environment.
